news.title:
CSB Bank's FY26 updates show 27% YoY Gross Advances growth to ₹40,364 cr; gold loans surged 53% YoY to ₹21,567 cr.
Total deposits rose 20% YoY to ₹44,246 cr, with term deposits up 27%. Shares traded at ₹369.2 on BSE, up from ₹360.65.
news.summary:
CSB Bank's FY26 updates show 27% YoY Gross Advances growth to ₹40,364 cr; gold loans surged 53% YoY to ₹21,567 cr.
Total deposits rose 20% YoY to ₹44,246 cr, with term deposits up 27%. Shares traded at ₹369.2 on BSE, up from ₹360.65.

news.title:
CSB Bank's gross advances rose to ₹403.6B from ₹318.4B.
Total deposits increased to ₹442.5B from ₹368.6B, indicating strong growth.
news.summary:
CSB Bank's gross advances rose to ₹403.6B from ₹318.4B.
Total deposits increased to ₹442.5B from ₹368.6B, indicating strong growth.

news.title:
CSB Bank dropped 2.1% to Rs.353.65, underperforming Sensex's 1.5% fall.
The week saw a Death Cross formation, mixed momentum, and valuation shifts.
news.summary:
CSB Bank dropped 2.1% to Rs.353.65, underperforming Sensex's 1.5% fall.
The week saw a Death Cross formation, mixed momentum, and valuation shifts.

news.title:
Manappuram, Muthoot Finance, and CSB Bank shares fell up to 5% due to gold price drops.
Gold corrected 11% last week, its steepest drop since 1983, falling 15% in a month.
news.summary:
Manappuram, Muthoot Finance, and CSB Bank shares fell up to 5% due to gold price drops.
Gold corrected 11% last week, its steepest drop since 1983, falling 15% in a month.

news.title:
CSB Bank's valuation shifts to attractive with P/E at 10.1 and P/BV at 1.34.
Investor sentiment and mixed sector performance drive reassessment of CSB Bank's appeal.
news.summary:
CSB Bank's valuation shifts to attractive with P/E at 10.1 and P/BV at 1.34.
Investor sentiment and mixed sector performance drive reassessment of CSB Bank's appeal.

news.title:
CSB Bank plans to double in 3 years, focusing on wholesale loans, gold loans, and SME growth by FY27.
By 2030, CSB aims for a 25%+ balance sheet CAGR, retail ramp-up post-FY28, and gold loans steady at 51%.
news.summary:
CSB Bank plans to double in 3 years, focusing on wholesale loans, gold loans, and SME growth by FY27.
By 2030, CSB aims for a 25%+ balance sheet CAGR, retail ramp-up post-FY28, and gold loans steady at 51%.

news.title:
CSB Bank Ltd surged 7.5% intraday on 16 Mar 2026, hitting Rs 355.1.
The stock outperformed its sector and broader market indices.
news.summary:
CSB Bank Ltd surged 7.5% intraday on 16 Mar 2026, hitting Rs 355.1.
The stock outperformed its sector and broader market indices.

news.title:
CSB Bank informed about an Analyst/Investor Meet held on Feb 25, 2026.
Broadway Capital participated in a virtual one-on-one meeting; no UPSI shared.
news.summary:
CSB Bank informed about an Analyst/Investor Meet held on Feb 25, 2026.
Broadway Capital participated in a virtual one-on-one meeting; no UPSI shared.

news.title:
CSB Bank closed at Rs.384.75 on 20 Feb 2026, down 0.9% weekly.
Despite a decline, the stock outperformed Sensex, gaining 7.3% intraday on 17 Feb.
news.summary:
CSB Bank closed at Rs.384.75 on 20 Feb 2026, down 0.9% weekly.
Despite a decline, the stock outperformed Sensex, gaining 7.3% intraday on 17 Feb.

news.title:
RBI fined CSB Bank ₹63.6M for non-compliance with BC rules and charges.
Penalty imposed under Banking Regulation Act sections 47A(1)(c) and 46(4)(i).
news.summary:
RBI fined CSB Bank ₹63.6M for non-compliance with BC rules and charges.
Penalty imposed under Banking Regulation Act sections 47A(1)(c) and 46(4)(i).

news.title:
CSB Bank reports a sharp rise in Q3 slippages.
Details on segments contributing to Q3 slippages are highlighted.
news.summary:
CSB Bank reports a sharp rise in Q3 slippages.
Details on segments contributing to Q3 slippages are highlighted.

news.title:
CSB Bank expects asset quality improvement despite current SME slippages, which are 80-90% secured.
Gold loans now form 51% of CSB Bank's portfolio, driven by higher ticket sizes and regulatory changes.
news.summary:
CSB Bank expects asset quality improvement despite current SME slippages, which are 80-90% secured.
Gold loans now form 51% of CSB Bank's portfolio, driven by higher ticket sizes and regulatory changes.

news.title: CSB Bank reports stable retail slippages, expects reduction from next quarter.
news.summary: CSB Bank reports stable retail slippages, expects reduction from next quarter.

news.title:
CSB Bank shares fell 18% amid worsening asset quality and higher provisions.
NSE advance-decline ratio reported at 7:2.
news.summary:
CSB Bank shares fell 18% amid worsening asset quality and higher provisions.
NSE advance-decline ratio reported at 7:2.

news.title:
Sensex rose 487 pts to 82,345; Nifty gained 167 pts to 25,343, driven by earnings, oil price rise, and order wins.
BEL surged 9% on profit jump; ONGC, Oil India up 9% each. Maruti, Hindustan Zinc, Asian Paints, CSB Bank lagged.
news.summary:
Sensex rose 487 pts to 82,345; Nifty gained 167 pts to 25,343, driven by earnings, oil price rise, and order wins.
BEL surged 9% on profit jump; ONGC, Oil India up 9% each. Maruti, Hindustan Zinc, Asian Paints, CSB Bank lagged.

news.title:
CSB Bank presented its Q3 FY26 unaudited financial results, showing a 25% YoY growth in total business to ₹77,621 Cr.
Net profit for Q3 FY26 stood at ₹153 Cr with net NPA at 0.67% and capital adequacy ratio at 19.41%.
news.summary:
CSB Bank presented its Q3 FY26 unaudited financial results, showing a 25% YoY growth in total business to ₹77,621 Cr.
Net profit for Q3 FY26 stood at ₹153 Cr with net NPA at 0.67% and capital adequacy ratio at 19.41%.

news.title:
CSB Bank Ltd opened 7.7% higher on 22 Jan 2026, reflecting positive sentiment.
The bank showed notable outperformance against its sector and benchmark indices.
news.summary:
CSB Bank Ltd opened 7.7% higher on 22 Jan 2026, reflecting positive sentiment.
The bank showed notable outperformance against its sector and benchmark indices.

news.title:
CSB Bank plans a conference call on Jan 28, 2026, at 5:30 PM IST to discuss Q3 FY26 results.
Details, including unaudited results and audio recordings, will be available on CSB Bank's website.
news.summary:
CSB Bank plans a conference call on Jan 28, 2026, at 5:30 PM IST to discuss Q3 FY26 results.
Details, including unaudited results and audio recordings, will be available on CSB Bank's website.

news.title:
Banks and NBFCs urge Union Budget 2026-27 to address deposit stress and MSME credit gaps amid strong credit demand.
Key asks include tax incentives, digital adoption, MSME refinance facilities, and a Rs 20,000 crore credit guarantee for MFIs.
news.summary:
Banks and NBFCs urge Union Budget 2026-27 to address deposit stress and MSME credit gaps amid strong credit demand.
Key asks include tax incentives, digital adoption, MSME refinance facilities, and a Rs 20,000 crore credit guarantee for MFIs.

news.title:
CSB Bank shifts from fair to expensive valuation due to price gains and stronger fundamentals.
Analysis includes P/E and P/BV ratios compared to peers and historical benchmarks for investor insights.
news.summary:
CSB Bank shifts from fair to expensive valuation due to price gains and stronger fundamentals.
Analysis includes P/E and P/BV ratios compared to peers and historical benchmarks for investor insights.
